- Aus den [[JTBD]] wird das tatsächliche Problem abgeleitet
	- Direkter Vorschlag: Nutzende brauchen eine Lösung

Lab technicians are currently forced to interrupt their work at least every 20 minutes to do repetitive work that could easily be automated. 
This results not only on lower efficiency but also in wasted resources. 
They need a an efficient, reliable solution that allows them to have more capacity for a wider variety of tasks.
